arguments.name: --version

arguments.name: --target
arguments.description: Target host, IP, MAC or URL.

arguments.name: --output
arguments.description: Output file path for the report.

arguments.description: Path to a wordlist (users, passwords, paths).

arguments.description: Print what would be done without making any changes.

arguments.name: --force
arguments.description: Force the action even if a safety check would block it.

documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `autoreconf -i`. Further invocations from upstream: `./generator/generator.ml`; `./configure`. hivex - a library for reading and writing Windows Registry "hive" files.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [shell_linux] in the Penetration Testing category. Fits when the engagement needs: hivex - a library for reading and writing Windows Registry "hive" files.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: hivex - a library for reading and writing Windows Registry "hive" files.
